metadata.name: Book a Flight with an Infant-in-Lap

description: A customer wants to book a flight for two adults and an infant who will travel on an adult's lap.

nodes.task_description: Create a booking for the two adult passengers.
Add the infant-in-lap to one of the adult passenger's records, including their name and date of birth.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly adds the infant to the booking.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer of any applicable taxes or fees for the infant and issue the tickets.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent explains the costs and issues all tickets.
